# DownloadsManager

Access via `client.NewClient().Downloads`.

## GetFileContent

`GET /files/{file_id}/content`

| Parameter | In | Type | Required |
|---|---|---|---|
| `file_id` | path | `string` | yes |
| `range` | header | `string` | no |
| `boxapi` | header | `string` | no |
| `version` | query | `string` | no |
| `access_token` | query | `string` | no |

**Returns:** a binary stream (`io.Reader`)

**Example**

```go
result, err := client.Downloads.GetFileContent(context.Background(), "FILE_ID", nil)
if err != nil {
	log.Fatal(err)
}
fmt.Println(result)
```
